movie.actors: Mark Wahlberg, Stanley Tucci, Kelsey Grammer, Nicola Peltz
movie.plot: Autobots must escape sight from a bounty hunter who has taken control of the human serendipity: Unexpectedly, Optimus Prime and his remaining gang turn to a mechanic, his daughter, and her back street racing boyfriend for help.
movie.title: Transformers: Age of Extinction
